corrections.note: The transcript has inserted editorial '(?)' not present in the print.

corrections.current: ἐπὶ τὸ κονίαμα τοῦ τοίχου καὶ οἴκου τοῦ βασιλέως
corrections.correct: ἐπὶ τὸ κονίαμα τοῦ τοίχου τοῦ οἴκου τοῦ βασιλέως
corrections.note: Printed text reads τοῦ οἴκου, not καὶ οἴκου.

corrections.current: τον εχοντα πνῆ (om A) ἐξουσίαν τῶν πν̄ς αυτων
corrections.correct: τον εχοντα πν̄ν (om A) ἐξουσίαν τῶν πν̄ς αυτων
corrections.note: Nomina sacra abbreviation is πν̄ν, not πνῆ.

corrections.correct: 5 om και 2° BaAQ | οικου] pr του AQ
corrections.note: The final apparatus note for v. 5 is omitted in the transcription.

notes: Bottom page number 535 is correctly present and not a correction target. Running head matches. Body otherwise agrees with the scan for the visible portion of Daniel 5.
